usage: 我们明天开会。Wǒmen míngtiān kāihuì. — We have a meeting tomorrow.
strokeTip: People gathering under a roof — the original sense of meeting together.

usage: 今天的议程是什么？Jīntiān de yìchéng shì shénme? — What is today's agenda?
strokeTip: Speech radical left, justice (义) right — speaking about what is just and right.

usage: 请确认日程。Qǐng quèrèn rìchéng. — Please confirm the schedule.
strokeTip: Grain (禾) left, official (呈) right — grain presented to officials, a formal process.

usage: 我提出一个建议。Wǒ tíchū yīgè jiànyì. — I raise a suggestion.
strokeTip: Hand (扌) left, 是 right — a hand raised to present something.

usage: 这个方案很好。Zhège fāng'àn hěn hǎo. — This plan is very good.
strokeTip: Roof (宀) top, 安 below — a case file kept under a roof for review.

usage: 会议通过了决议。Huìyì tōngguò le juéyì. — The meeting passed the resolution.
strokeTip: Water breaking through (氵) + decisive strike (夬) — a dam breaking, a firm decision.

usage: 通过表决。Tōngguò biǎojué. — Passed by vote.
strokeTip: Movement (辶) wrapping, 甬 inside — a path that goes all the way through.

usage: 请举手表决。Qǐng jǔshǒu biǎojué. — Please raise your hand to vote.
strokeTip: Clothes (衣) with a stroke on top — what appears on the outside, expressing outwardly.

usage: 谁来主持这次会议？Shuí lái zhǔchí zhècì huìyì? — Who will chair this meeting?
strokeTip: A lamp with a flame on top — the main light, the one in charge.

usage: 他主持了会议。Tā zhǔchí le huìyì. — He chaired the meeting.
strokeTip: Hand (扌) left, temple (寺) right — holding steady like a temple pillar.

usage: 请发言。Qǐng fāyán. — Please speak / You have the floor.
strokeTip: Two strokes launching like an arrow — sending something outward.

usage: 欢迎大家踊跃发言。Huānyíng dàjiā yǒngyuè fāyán. — Everyone is welcome to speak up.
strokeTip: A mouth with three lines above — words flowing out of a mouth.

usage: 请整理会议纪要。Qǐng zhěnglǐ huìyì jìyào. — Please prepare the meeting minutes.
strokeTip: Silk (纟) left, 己 right — silk threads bound to oneself, a personal record.

usage: 这是本次会议的纪要。Zhè shì běncì huìyì de jìyào. — These are the minutes of this meeting.
strokeTip: West (西) top, woman (女) below — reaching for what is most essential.

usage: 请写一份摘要。Qǐng xiě yīfèn zhāiyào. — Please write a summary.
strokeTip: Hand (扌) left, 商 right — a hand carefully picking the best parts.

usage: 请跟进这个项目。Qǐng gēnjìn zhège xiàngmù. — Please follow up on this project.
strokeTip: Foot (足) left, 艮 right — a foot that follows closely behind.

usage: 项目进展顺利。Xiàngmù jìnzhǎn shùnlì. — The project is progressing smoothly.
strokeTip: Movement radical wrapping around a well — moving forward into depth.

usage: 截止日期是周五。Jiézhǐ rìqī shì zhōuwǔ. — The deadline is Friday.
strokeTip: A sword cutting through something — a sharp cut-off point.

usage: 报名截止时间是下周一。Bàomíng jiézhǐ shíjiān shì xià zhōuyī. — Registration closes next Monday.
strokeTip: A foot that has stopped moving — the foot planted on the ground.

usage: 会议延期到下周。Huìyì yánqī dào xià zhōu. — The meeting is postponed to next week.
strokeTip: Movement (辶) wrapping, 正 inside — taking a longer path, extending the journey.

usage: 会议已取消。Huìyì yǐ qǔxiāo. — The meeting has been cancelled.
strokeTip: Ear (耳) left, hand (又) right — a hand taking from what was heard.

usage: 请取消这次预约。Qǐng qǔxiāo zhècì yùyuē. — Please cancel this appointment.
strokeTip: Water (氵) left, 肖 right — water that makes something disappear, dissolving away.

usage: 请签署合同。Qǐng qiānshǔ hétong. — Please sign the contract.
strokeTip: A lid (人) fitting perfectly onto a mouth (口) — fitting together, combined.

usage: 合同已签署。Hétong yǐ qiānshǔ. — The contract has been signed.
strokeTip: Bamboo (⺮) top, two signs (今 & 㕣) below — bamboo strips being signed with marks.

usage: 双方已签署协议。Shuāngfāng yǐ qiānshǔ xiéyì. — Both parties have signed the agreement.
strokeTip: Net (罒) on top, 者 below — casting a net of authority, an official seal.

usage: 请仔细阅读条款。Qǐng zǐxì yuèdú tiáokuǎn. — Please read the terms carefully.
strokeTip: Wood (木) with a path stroke — a branch of a tree, a single item in a list.

usage: 付款条款已商定。Fùkuǎn tiáokuǎn yǐ shāngdìng. — Payment terms have been agreed.
strokeTip: Lack (欠) right — a mouth open to receive, something owed or offered.

usage: 请于30天内付款。Qǐng yú 30 tiān nèi fùkuǎn. — Please pay within 30 days.
strokeTip: Person (亻) left, temple (寺) right — a person making a formal offering.

usage: 违约将承担法律责任。Wéiyuē jiāng chéngdān fǎlǜ zérèn. — Breach of contract will incur legal liability.
strokeTip: Movement (辶) wrapping, 韦 inside — going against the set path, deviating.

usage: 双方签订了合约。Shuāngfāng qiāndìng le héyuē. — Both parties signed the agreement.
strokeTip: Silk (纟) left, 勺 right — silk threads bound by a ladle, tying an agreement.

usage: 需要支付赔偿金。Xūyào zhīfù péicháng jīn. — Compensation must be paid.
strokeTip: Shell/money (贝) left, 咅 right — money given back to make whole.

usage: 赔偿金额为五万元。Péicháng jīn'é wéi wǔwàn yuán. — The compensation amount is 50,000 yuan.
strokeTip: Person (亻) left, 尝 right — a person tasting the cost and paying it back.

usage: 合同将于年底终止。Hétong jiāng yú niándǐ zhōngzhǐ. — The contract will terminate at year end.
strokeTip: Silk (纟) left, winter (冬) right — threads ending at the last season, termination.

usage: 合同有效期为一年。Hétong yǒuxiào qī wéi yī nián. — The contract validity is one year.
strokeTip: Cross (交) left, strike (攵) right — actions that cross to produce results.

usage: 甲方负责提供场地。Jiǎfāng fùzé tígōng chǎngdì. — Party A is responsible for providing the venue.
strokeTip: A field (田) with a line sticking out from the top — the first and foremost, Party A.

usage: 乙方负责执行工作。Yǐfāng fùzé zhíxíng gōngzuò. — Party B is responsible for executing the work.
strokeTip: A curved stroke like a winding river — the second party, following after 甲.

usage: 双方同意此条款。Shuāngfāng tóngyì cǐ tiáokuǎn. — Both parties agree to this clause.
strokeTip: Two birds (隹) on a hand — a pair held together, both sides.

usage: 双方各自承担责任。Shuāngfāng gèzì chéngdān zérèn. — Both parties bear their respective responsibilities.
strokeTip: A square boat shape — pointing in one clear direction, a side or party.

usage: 请保密此合同内容。Qǐng bǎomì cǐ hétong nèiróng. — Please keep this contract confidential.
strokeTip: Person (亻) left, 保 right — a person wrapped in layers of protection.

usage: 签署保密协议。Qiānshǔ bǎomì xiéyì. — Sign a confidentiality agreement (NDA).
strokeTip: Roof (宀) on top, mountain (山) and silk (纟) below — secrets hidden under a mountain roof.

usage: 请提前30天发出通知。Qǐng tíqián 30 tiān fāchū tōngzhī. — Please give 30 days' notice.
strokeTip: Arrow (矢) left, mouth (口) right — words that fly straight like arrows, knowledge.

usage: 本公司授权您代表处理此事。Běn gōngsī shòuquán nín dàibiǎo chǔlǐ cǐ shì. — Our company authorizes you to handle this.
strokeTip: Hand (扌) left, 受 (receive) right — a hand extending authority to receive.

usage: 版权归原作者所有。Bǎnquán guī yuán zuòzhě suǒyǒu. — Copyright belongs to the original author.
strokeTip: Tree (木) left, 又 right — a tree branch that extends power outward.

usage: 依据中国法律。Yījù Zhōngguó fǎlǜ. — In accordance with Chinese law.
strokeTip: Step (彳) left, 聿 right — a pen moving in step, laying down the law.

usage: 争议提交仲裁解决。Zhēngyì tíjiāo zhòngcái jiějué. — Disputes shall be resolved by arbitration.
strokeTip: Person (亻) left, 中 (middle) right — a person in the middle, mediating.

usage: 由第三方仲裁机构裁决。Yóu dìsānfāng zhòngcái jīgòu cáijué. — To be decided by a third-party arbitration body.
strokeTip: Clothes (衣) with a knife (刀) — cutting cloth to size, a precise ruling.

usage: 本合同受上海法院管辖。Běn hétong shòu Shànghǎi fǎyuàn guǎnxiá. — This contract is under Shanghai court jurisdiction.
strokeTip: Bamboo (⺮) top, official (官) below — an official bamboo pipe controlling flow.

usage: 详见附件。Xiáng jiàn fùjiàn. — See attachment for details.
strokeTip: Mound (阝) left, 付 right — attached to the side, added on.

usage: 请查阅相关文件。Qǐng cháyuè xiāngguān wénjiàn. — Please review the relevant documents.
strokeTip: Person (亻) left, 牛 (ox) right — a person with an ox, counting items by head.

usage: 合同条款可协商修改。Hétong tiáokuǎn kě xiéshāng xiūgǎi. — Contract terms can be amended by negotiation.
strokeTip: Person (亻) left, 攸 right — a person on a path making things neat, revising.

usage: 如需修改请提前通知。Rú xū xiūgǎi qǐng tíqián tōngzhī. — Please notify in advance if amendments are needed.
strokeTip: Self (己) left, strike (攵) right — striking through oneself to change direction.

usage: 合同到期后自动续约。Hétong dàoqī hòu zìdòng xùyuē. — The contract renews automatically upon expiry.
strokeTip: Silk (纟) left, 卖 right — threads continuing to be sold on, carrying forward.

usage: 合同到期日为12月31日。Hétong dàoqī rì wéi 12 yuè 31 rì. — Contract expiry date is December 31.
strokeTip: Moon (月) right, 其 left — lunar cycle marking a period of time.
